description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined fuselage, suggesting a design optimized for high-speed flight. The wings are swept back with a noticeable anhedral angle, and each wing features downward-curved tips, enhancing aerodynamic stability. The aircraft has twin jet engines mounted on the upper rear fuselage, with visible intakes and exhausts. The tail section is equipped with a conventional horizontal stabilizer and a single vertical stabilizer, both integrated smoothly into the overall design. The cockpit is positioned forward and appears to be enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy, providing a commanding view for the pilot. The undercarriage is not visible, implying retractable landing gear for reduced drag during flight.
description: A futuristic, dark-colored jet airplane with swept-back wings, twin upper rear jet engines, and a pointed nose. The design is streamlined with a forward, enclosed cockpit and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the wide, swept-back wings with downward-curved tips.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, twin upper rear jet engines, and the smooth integration of the tail and wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhausts, the anhedral wing configuration, and the single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the wing and engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept-back wings and pronounced anhedral angle; downward-curved wingtip extensions present.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on the upper rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy.
